title: Poker Championship
description:
Poker Championship is a real-time Texas Hold’em Poker game where you play against real players from around the world.

No bots. No house players. No computer-controlled opponents pretending to be users. No dealing manipulation.

Take a seat at live poker tables, compete in frequent tournaments, climb weekly rankings, and enjoy fair poker built around real multiplayer competition.

REAL PLAYERS. NO BOTS. NO HOUSE PLAYERS.Poker Championship is built for players who want a real poker table experience online. You compete against real people, never bots or house players.

CERTIFIED FAIR PLAYEvery hand is dealt using a certified Random Number Generator. The shuffle is random, unpredictable, and protected from manipulation. 

• No rigged dealing. 

• No hidden card control. 

• No unfair advantage.

GAME MODE• REAL-TIME CASH GAMES

Join live Texas Hold’em cash game tables anytime. Manage your bankroll, read the table, choose your timing, and test your poker instincts against real opponents.

• FREQUENT MULTI-TABLE TOURNAMENTS

Multi-Table Tournaments are held frequently, with new events currently starting every 10 minutes. Compete in large tournament fields, survive the action, build your stack, and chase the final table.

• SIT-N-GO TOURNAMENTS

Jump into quick 5-player and 9-player SIT-N-GO tournaments for fast competitive poker sessions.

• PROGRESSIVE BOUNTY TOURNAMENTS

Enjoy Progressive Bounty tournaments, where every knockout can make the next bounty even bigger. Hunt your targets, protect your stack, and turn each elimination into a bigger opportunity.

WEEKLY RANKINGSCash games and tournaments each have weekly rankings based on the chips you win during the week. Your rank is displayed in the game throughout the competition, and big ranking rewards are paid out every week.

WORLD TOUR SEASONTravel through poker cities in two-week World Tour Seasons. Earn Tour Credits, climb the rankings, and compete for a place in the in-game Invitational Tournament held at the end of each season. The top 100 players are invited in-game at the scheduled time.

REWARDS AND VIP BENEFITSCollect free chips, open Lucky Boxes, chase Jackpot chances, complete missions, unlock avatars, and enjoy bigger benefits through Prime Membership, our VIP Program.

CONTINUOUS PLAY ACROSS DEVICESStart playing on your phone, tablet, TV, or PC and continue with the same bankroll on supported devices.

Poker Championship is a social casino poker game intended for adult audiences. It does not offer real-money gambling. Chips, rewards, and in-game items have no real-world monetary value and cannot be exchanged for real money, cash, goods, services, or real-world prizes in any way.
description_short: Play real-time Texas Hold’em Poker with real players from around the world. No bots, no house players, no dealing manipulation — just fair poker with cash games, tournaments, rankings, and rewards.
